rationale: Fresh validation passes for TASK-092. Accepted feedback, documentation, planning, and implementation builds form a traceable chain. Oversized builds and roadmap docs were condensed while preserving build lifecycle, traceability, task-boundary, sprint, retention, closure, and generated-view semantics. Rebuilt graph reports green health with zero lint warnings, generated parity passes, and npm test passes.

issues.summary: changed audit warns generated graph/TASK-092 views are changed; expected for generated state refresh before commit.
Earlier implementation block exists because initial validation omitted planning/build proof; this pass supersedes it.

audit_reports: audit:alignment pass Checked generated graph health and roadmap queue reachability.
audit:generated-parity pass Checked generated graph presence, freshness, and 1 active roadmap task views against canonical sources.
audit:changed warning only generated .codewiki/index_graph.json and TASK-092 task view/context changed.
audit:task pass Checked roadmap task TASK-092.

isolation_requirement.reason: Implementation validation requires independent validator context and checked content proof.

audit_requirement.reason: Gateway profiles require deterministic audit evidence for their build or boundary context.

isolation.notes: Dirty pre-commit validation for docs-size cleanup.
